target.label: Small launch vehicle educational cutaway mockup
target.scope: design-thinking and 3D-printable assembly package before STL generation
target.not_for: flight hardware, propulsion certification, propellant formula, ignition instructions, pressure vessel design, launch operations, or working engine manufacture

disclaimer: MRL-0.5 readiness evidence only; not manufacturing, flight, medical, or certification approval.

categories.name: overhang/support readiness
categories.note: overhang=45, supports=tree, orientation=body halves flat on split line; tank modules horizontal with labels upward; engine cartridge horizontal; interstage ring flat; fairing halves on split faces

categories.name: serviceability
categories.note: service access points 11, service terms 206, svg markers 0

loop_feedback:
Preserve MRL-0.5 manufacturing evidence for small_launch_vehicle: keep datum, tolerance, service, inspection, and risk traces while improving geometry.
- Add or preserve datum/tolerance/inspection statements tied to visible geometry and assembly interfaces.
- Keep the design at educational mockup level; do not claim certification or real flight/manufacturing readiness.

evidence.material: PETG + clear PETG windows + TPU pads
